dj_text: That was Wrecking Ball (Medieval Version). Next up, something completely different — just kidding, it's The Smiths - Heaven Knows I'm Miserable Now (Medieval Version).
commercial_text: Hey, listeners! You heard about SonicScratcher Tech?
hijack_text: {cool_dj_drop} Haulin' frequencies across cosmic waves, y'al
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: The Smiths - Heaven Knows I'm Miserable Now (Medieval Version)
